advisory.title: Incomplete host env sanitization blocklist allows supply-chain redirection via package-manager env overrides
advisory.description:
## Summary

Host exec env override sanitization did not fail closed for several package-manager and related redirect variables that can steer dependency fetches or startup behavior.

## Impact

An approved exec request could silently redirect package resolution or runtime bootstrap to attacker-controlled infrastructure and execute trojanized content.

## Affected Component

`src/infra/host-env-security-policy.json, src/infra/host-env-security.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `< 2026.3.22`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.22`

## Fix

Fixed by commit `7abfff756d6c68d17e21d1657bbacbaec86de232` (`Exec: harden host env override handling across gateway and node`).

introducingCommits.subject: LINE: harden Express webhook parsing to verified raw body (#51202)

timeline.notes: This case uses the immediate parent of fix commit 7abfff756d6c68d17e21d1657bbacbaec86de232 as the last known vulnerable snapshot. Exact introduction commit mapping is still pending.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should detect commandinjection when scanning vulnerableHead. This case uses the last known vulnerable pre-fix commit pending exact introduction mapping.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_is_fix_parent
checks.details: Using parent c7134e629c917c120c79f6988b78069fda244318 of fix commit 7abfff756d6c68d17e21d1657bbacbaec86de232 as the last known vulnerable commit.

checks.name: baseline_precedes_vulnerable_head
checks.details: Using direct parent 11d71ca35219b27d3604f99b181006d19129461e of vulnerableHead c7134e629c917c120c79f6988b78069fda244318 as a temporary baseline until exact introduction mapping is completed.
